summary: Impeccable audience recording with crystal‑clear mastering; the show shines especially on a beautiful rendition of China Doll.
review: The tape, sourced from Rango Keshavan’s AUD feed and mastered by Charlie Miller, is repeatedly described as “unbelievably spectacular” and an almost perfect replica of the night’s sound.  While reviewers focus mainly on the audio fidelity, the performance itself receives praise – notably a lovely version of “China Doll.”  Overall the consensus is that this recording offers both top‑tier sound quality and an enjoyable show.

ai_rating.rationale: Most reviewers give 4–5 stars and emphasize excellent soundboard‑quality audience recording; the only specific musical highlight is a praised China Doll, leading to a strong combined rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Rango Keshavan AUD capture mastered by Charlie Miller described as crisp, pure, and an accurate representation of the live mix; no noted drop‑outs or muddiness.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewers do not comment on set structure; focus is on overall vibe and recording fidelity rather than detailed pacing.
